description_long: This is a sleek, low-profile sports car with a vibrant red exterior and bold white racing stripes running from the hood to the rear. The car features a streamlined body with sharply angled windows and a slightly raised rear, giving it an aggressive, aerodynamic look. The front end is characterized by a wide grille and dark-tinted headlights, while the rear showcases dual vertical taillights and a subtle integrated bumper. The wheels are black with a star-shaped, five-spoke design, adding to the car's sporty appeal. The side panels are smooth with minimal ornamentation, and the roofline slopes gently toward the back. The windows are dark blue, suggesting tinted glass, and the overall build hints at a high-performance vehicle designed for speed and agility.
description: A red sports car with white racing stripes, black five-spoke wheels, and a streamlined, aggressive design. Features include tinted windows, dual vertical taillights, and a low, aerodynamic profile.
description_view_0: Side view showing the red body, white stripes, black five-spoke wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_1: Rear three-quarter view highlighting the dual vertical taillights, rear window, and continuation of the white stripes.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar features to view 0, emphasizing the smooth side panel and wheel design.
description_view_3: Front three-quarter view displaying the wide grille, dark headlights, and the start of the white racing stripes.
